Stop.command: bash -c 'idx=$(grep -oP "Pages: \K[0-9]+" ~/repos/llm-wiki/index.md 2>/dev/null); pages=$(find ~/repos/llm-wiki/wiki -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); [ -n "$idx" ] && [ "$pages" != "$idx" ] && echo "wiki-ops: $pages pages on disk but index.md says $idx — update index before committing" || true'
